---
title: "Page Not Found"
description: "Sorry — that page doesn't exist or has moved."
image: images/social-card.png
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

Here's where things live these days:

- [Home](/) — who I am and what I do
- [Consulting](/consulting.html) — data science & AI consulting
- [Workshops](/workshops.html) — hands-on courses in R, Python, SQL, and AI
- [Talks](/talks.html) — slides and recordings from past presentations
- [Portfolio](/portfolio.html) — books, apps, and R/Python packages, including ModernDive

If you followed a link here that you think should work, [let me know](mailto:chester.ismay@gmail.com).
